Oakridge HealthBank, Inc. — Operational/Cyber Update (Public Notice) — 2026-06-05
Scope: This bulletin summarizes a minor network alert and ESG reporting rehearsal; it does not include MNPI under SEC Reg FD.
Summary: A scheduled patch window on 2026-06-03 temporarily throttled claims processing for 11 minutes; services restored within SLA and no PHI or NPPI exposure occurred.
Root cause: Load balancer health checks misapplied in a staging-to-prod handoff; issue tracked under Ticket ID INC-OPS-00A0.
Customer impact: No consumer banking transactions failed; placeholder account references (e.g., Acct ****0000) in this notice are illustrative and not linkable to any household.
Security posture: An external IP range performed credential stuffing against a sandbox; controls blocked attempts and there was no access to patient or depositor records.
Crypto/fintech context (training): Employees reviewed a demo wallet flow in a tabletop exercise; no production keys, tokens, or trading systems were involved.
Non-public indicators of compromise, vendor patch ETAs, and device inventories are restricted to the insider list and will be shared only within the information-barrier perimeter until mitigation completes.
ESG/climate note (public/stale): Our 2024 Scope 2 methodology and climate scenario ranges were disclosed in the April Sustainability Update and match what appears on our website.
Operational communications: A routine blackout period for voluntary employee trading remains scheduled for quarter-end; this notice is advisory and not a trading instruction.
Commercial terms (education): Sample term-sheet language used in analyst training references “volume rebates” and “minimum uptime,” but these are templates and not live counterparty commitments.
Regulatory coordination: We do not anticipate a Form 8-K cyber item based on current materiality thresholds; any future SEC or exchange communications will be made broadly and contemporaneously.
A draft addendum with CareVista Clinics on climate-resilience metrics is in internal review and not yet public; distribution is limited to the deal team wall-crossed under policy FIN-IB-12.
Contacts: For general questions email ir@oakridgehb.example or call our public helpline at 1-833-000-0000; for security notifications use security-ops@oakridgehb.example.
Disclaimer: This report may reuse terms like insider list, tipping, and MNPI in a training context; it contains only public or non-attributable information and excludes patient, consumer, or employee identifiers.
